stemHtml: When a State does not comply with an ICAO International Standard, what is it obligated to do?

options.a: Notify the ICAO Council and publish the differences in the national AIP.
options.b: Publish the differences in the national AIP only.
options.c: The standard is binding on all member states with no opt-out.
options.d: Publish Standard differences in the AIP and notify ICAO of Recommended Practice differences.
